sourcesContent: import React from 'react'; import { CSidebar, CSidebarBrand, CSidebarNav, CNavItem, CNavTitle, CNavGroup, CNavLink, } from '@coreui/react'; import CIcon from '@coreui/icons-react'; import { cilSpeedometer, cilUser, cilSettings, cilPuzzle, cilLockLocked, cilList, } from '@coreui/icons'; const Sidebar = ({ sidebarShow, setSidebarShow }) => { return ( setSidebarShow(val)} className="modern-sidebar" > {/* Logo */} {/* Nav Items */} Dashboard Dashboard Management Users Roles Buttons Forms Settings Settings ); }; export default Sidebar;
